name: Eagle View
description: Platform-wide overview: farms, finances, harvest, environment, attestations, sensors, and trends

cards.name: Platform Overview
cards.description: Total locations, farms, plots, crop cycles, partners, staff, infrastructure

native.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM location WHERE status = 'active') as total_locations,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM farm WHERE status = 'active') as total_farms,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM plot) as total_plots,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crop_cycle WHERE status = 'active') as active_crop_cycles,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM partner) as total_partners,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staff) as total_staff,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM infrastructure_asset) as total_infrastructure;

cards.name: Financial Summary
cards.description: Revenue, expenses, NOI, and operating margin

native.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(SUM(se.total_amount), 0) as gross_revenue,
  COALESCE(SUM(se.return_amount + se.discount_amount), 0) as returns_discounts,
  COALESCE(SUM(se.total_amount) - SUM(se.return_amount + se.discount_amount), 0) as net_revenue,
  COALESCE(SUM(ee.amount), 0) as total_expenses,
  COALESCE(SUM(se.total_amount) - SUM(se.return_amount + se.discount_amount), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(ee.amount), 0) as noi,
  CASE
    WHEN SUM(se.total_amount) - SUM(se.return_amount + se.discount_amount) > 0
    THEN ROUND(
      (SUM(se.total_amount) - SUM(se.return_amount + se.discount_amount) - SUM(ee.amount)) /
      NULLIF(SUM(se.total_amount) - SUM(se.return_amount + se.discount_amount), 0) * 100::numeric,
      2
    )
    ELSE 0
  END as operating_margin_pct
FROM sales_event se
LEFT JOIN expense_event ee ON se.crop_cycle_id = ee.crop_cycle_id
WHERE se.status != 'rejected';

cards.name: Harvest & Loss by Crop
cards.description: Harvest volume, loss rate, and sales by crop

native.query:
SELECT
  c.name as crop,
  COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) as harvest_events,
  COALESCE(SUM(h.quantity), 0) as total_harvest_kg,
  COALESCE(SUM(le.quantity), 0) as total_loss_kg,
  CASE
    WHEN SUM(h.quantity) > 0
    THEN ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(le.quantity, 0)) / SUM(h.quantity) * 100, 2)
    ELSE 0
  END as loss_rate_pct,
  COALESCE(SUM(se.total_amount), 0) as total_sales_usd
FROM crop c
JOIN crop_cycle cc ON c.id = cc.crop_id
LEFT JOIN harvest_event h ON cc.id = h.crop_cycle_id AND h.status != 'rejected'
LEFT JOIN loss_event le ON cc.id = le.crop_cycle_id AND le.status != 'rejected'
LEFT JOIN sales_event se ON cc.id = se.crop_cycle_id AND se.status != 'rejected'
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY total_harvest_kg DESC;

cards.name: Monthly Revenue Trend
cards.description: Net revenue, expenses, and NOI trend over last 12 months

native.query: WITH monthly_revenue AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', sale_date) as month, COUNT(DISTINCT id) as sales_count, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as gross_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(return_amount + discount_amount), 0) as returns_discounts, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount) - SUM(return_amount + discount_amount), 0) as net_revenue FROM sales_event WHERE status != 'rejected' AND sale_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', sale_date)), monthly_expenses AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', expense_date) as month, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) as period_expenses FROM expense_event WHERE status != 'rejected' AND expense_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', expense_date)) SELECT COALESCE(r.month, e.month) as month, COALESCE(r.sales_count, 0) as sales_count, COALESCE(r.gross_revenue, 0) as gross_revenue, COALESCE(r.returns_discounts, 0) as returns_discounts, COALESCE(r.net_revenue, 0) as net_revenue, COALESCE(e.period_expenses, 0) as period_expenses, COALESCE(r.net_revenue, 0) - COALESCE(e.period_expenses, 0) as period_noi FROM monthly_revenue r FULL JOIN monthly_expenses e ON r.month = e.month ORDER BY month DESC;

cards.name: Attestation Coverage
cards.description: Onchain/offchain attestation status and coverage by claim type

native.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(ar.claim_type, 'unattested') as claim_type,
  COUNT(ar.id) as total_records,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'published' THEN 1 END) as published,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'verified' THEN 1 END) as verified,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'draft' THEN 1 END) as draft,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ar.chain IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as onchain_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ar.chain IS NULL THEN 1 END) as offchain_count,
  CASE
    WHEN COUNT(ar.id) > 0
    THEN ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'published' THEN 1 END)::numeric / COUNT(ar.id) * 100, 1)
    ELSE 0
  END as publication_rate_pct
FROM attestation_record ar
GROUP BY ar.claim_type
ORDER BY total_records DESC;

cards.name: Sensor & Alert Status
cards.description: Active sensors, readings, and alert counts by type

native.query:
SELECT
  st.name as sensor_type,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sd.id) as device_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sr.id) as total_readings,
  COALESCE(AVG(sr.value), 0) as avg_value,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sa.id) as total_alerts,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN sa.severity = 'critical' THEN 1 END) as critical_alerts,
  MAX(sr.reading_time) as latest_reading
FROM sensor_type st
LEFT JOIN sensor_device sd ON st.id = sd.sensor_type_id AND sd.status = 'active'
LEFT JOIN sensor_reading sr ON sd.id = sr.sensor_id
LEFT JOIN sensor_alert sa ON sr.id = sa.reading_id
GROUP BY st.name
ORDER BY device_count DESC;

cards.name: NDVI Trend
cards.description: NDVI vegetation index trajectory per plot over time

native.query: SELECT rs.observation_date, p.name AS plot_name, rs.ndvi FROM remote_sensing_observation rs JOIN plot p ON rs.plot_id = p.id WHERE rs.ndvi IS NOT NULL ORDER BY rs.observation_date ASC, p.name;

cards.name: Soil Carbon Trend
cards.description: Soil organic carbon measurements over time per plot

native.query: SELECT scm.measurement_date, p.name AS plot_name, scm.carbon_tonnes_per_ha FROM soil_carbon_measurement scm JOIN plot p ON scm.plot_id = p.id ORDER BY scm.measurement_date ASC, p.name;

cards.name: Biodiversity Trend
cards.description: Species count per observation date per plot

native.query: SELECT so.observation_date, p.name AS plot_name, COUNT(DISTINCT so.species_name) AS species_count FROM species_observation so JOIN plot p ON so.plot_id = p.id GROUP BY so.observation_date, p.name ORDER BY so.observation_date ASC, p.name;

cards.name: Soil Health Trend
cards.description: Soil pH and organic matter levels over time per plot

native.query: SELECT ss.sample_date, p.name AS plot_name, ss.ph, ss.organic_matter_pct FROM soil_sample ss JOIN plot p ON ss.plot_id = p.id ORDER BY ss.sample_date ASC, p.name;

cards.name: Rainfall Trend
cards.description: Precipitation and temperature over time per location

native.query: SELECT wo.observation_date, l.name AS location_name, SUM(wo.rainfall_mm) AS total_rainfall_mm, AVG(wo.temperature_c) AS avg_temperature_c FROM weather_observation wo JOIN location l ON wo.location_id = l.id GROUP BY wo.observation_date, l.name ORDER BY wo.observation_date ASC;

cards.name: Crop Diversity by Season
cards.description: Number of crop cycles and unique crops per season per plot

native.query: SELECT cc.season, p.name AS plot_name, COUNT(*) AS cycle_count, COUNT(DISTINCT c.name) AS unique_crops FROM crop_cycle cc JOIN crop c ON cc.crop_id = c.id JOIN plot p ON cc.plot_id = p.id WHERE cc.season IS NOT NULL GROUP BY cc.season, p.name ORDER BY cc.season ASC, p.name;

cards.name: Expense Breakdown
cards.description: Expenses by category with direct vs shared classification

native.query:
SELECT
  ec.name as category,
  CASE WHEN ec.is_direct = true THEN 'Direct' ELSE 'Shared' END as cost_type,
  COUNT(ee.id) as transaction_count,
  SUM(ee.amount) as total_amount,
  AVG(ee.amount) as avg_transaction
FROM expense_event ee
JOIN expense_category ec ON ee.category = ec.name
WHERE ee.status != 'rejected'
GROUP BY ec.name, ec.is_direct
ORDER BY total_amount DESC;
